DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO FIRE DEPARTMENT, THE SAN FRANCISCO FIRE COMMISSION, THE CIVIL SERVICE COMMISSION OF SAN FRANCISCO, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Regarding Claims Brought By Plaintiffs Andre Price And Kenneth Farris 115th Academy is continued to April 6, 2017, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. The Court confirms its tentative ruling as to Andre Price regarding the first cause of action for race discrimination. The Court believes that Mr. Price has not shown any evidence that he was performing competently. In addition, the Court denies the disability discrimination claim and failure to accommodate claims. The Court finds the disability claim did not meet the definition of FEHA disability. With regard to Kenneth Farris, the Court adopts all aspects of the tentative ruling, except the discrimination claim. The Court takes the discrimination claims, and the connection between certain remarks and his termination from the academy, UNDER SUBMISSION.
